title: Men’s lockers for rent for the 2017-2018 season.

content:
We will be offering 50 lockers in the Men’s change room for rent for the 2017-2018 season. They will be offered for $100 for a one year rental.

To apply for a locker, either email Jeff or get in touch with the front desk by September 10th. If more than 50 people apply, we will have a draw on September 11th, and then the winners will be able to pick their own on September 12th. That locker will be reserved for their personal use until August 31, 2018.

Locker Rental
